title: Mine and Slash Compatibility
description: Enables Compatibility mode for Mine and Slash
body:
This is an addon for Mine and Slash.

Installing it will activate ability to choose different compatibility modes for Mine and Slash:


1) Original Mode - default Mine and slash

2) Compatible mode - same as default, but other mod's spells are scaled/converted with Mine and slash damage

3) Lite Mode - drastically change the mod into a 'lite' version, making it better for modpacks that aren't focused on Mine and slash:
- Instead of replacing or nullifying the damage of other mods, Mine and Slash will instead only add bonus damage, making it work with other mods
- Level scaling will be drastically lowered to not overshadow other mods
- Certain Gui elements will be hidden
- Values of mob damage, player stats etc will be lowered to mesh better with more vanilla modpacks
- Certain Mine and Slash features like stat or weapon requirements will be lowered or disabled
- Other tweaks which you can read about fully [here](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/mine-and-slash/docs/modpack_dev/compatibility_addon)


Also, all these options are configurable, these are just the default options. 

Requires Mine and Slash v6.0.0 and up

As an extra feature, it comes with damage source debugging commands:

/mns_compat damage_watch

These can be used to see what type of damage other mod's weapons do, to make it easier to create mine and slash datapacks for these weapons.
